questions.question: Write a Java code snippet to handle a GET request in a servlet, and explain the purpose of the doGet method.
questions.hint: Mention the doGet method and its purpose in servlets

questions.question: Describe the difference between HTTP status codes 200 and 404, and provide an example of when each would be used in a servlet.
questions.hint: Explain HTTP status codes 200 and 404, and provide examples

questions.question: How can you handle form data in an HTTP POST request in a servlet using the RequestDispatcher class? Provide a code snippet to demonstrate this.
questions.hint: Explain the RequestDispatcher class and its role in handling form data
